commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: The component has significant issues with design token usage—many hardcoded fallback colors (e.g., '#52525b', '#18181b') are used instead of relying purely on CSS variables, and inline styles with hardcoded values appear throughout. The code is also incomplete (ForecastDay.tsx cuts off mid-function), making it impossible to fully evaluate layout and polish. While data handling from props is generally correct, the design system integration is inconsistent and incomplete.

violations: Hardcoded string "Tokyo" found — should be a prop default
Hardcoded string "Sunny" found — should be a prop default
